description: Gitpod, now branded Ona, provides cloud development environments and AI coding agents for software teams. Its platform lets users create and manage workspaces/environments, automations, and related organization resources.
summary: gitpod.io exposes two authenticated developer surfaces for Gitpod Classic (a public HTTP API and the Gitpod CLI) and, under the same service/docs footprint after the Ona rebrand, an authenticated Ona HTTP API and Ona CLI; no public GraphQL or first-party MCP server endpoint was found.
